title: ZXPong

hero.alt: ZX Series arcade game collection featuring ZXSnake, ZXBrick and ZXPong

shortDescription: A modern take on the classic arcade paddle game, built for quick matches, multiplayer competition, and endless score chasing.
description: ZXPong is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), combining the simplicity of the arcade classic with modern mobile features. Challenge AI opponents, compete in World PVP, unlock cosmetic paddle skins, collect coins during play, earn achievements, climb the leaderboards, and experience fast-paced arcade action wherever you play.
features: BarkinMad Coins for cross-game cosmetic rewards

barkinMadCoins.description: Earn [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series) through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic rewards across supported BarkinMad Studios games. Coins have no cash value and are earned entirely through gameplay.

seoTitle: ZXPong | Retro Paddle Arcade Game | BarkinMad Studios
summary: ZXPong is a fast-paced retro arcade paddle game featuring AI opponents, World PVP, collectible coins, unlockable paddle skins, achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.
